featureName: Stripe Trial Payment Collection and Blocked Mode
description: Adapt Stripe billing so trial users who enter payment info are not charged until trial ends.

userStories.title: DB Migration
acceptanceCriteria: Migration adds payment_method_added BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE

userStories.title: Stripe Checkout with trial_end
userStories.notes: trial_end passed to Stripe, payment_method_added set in verifyCheckout, no_payment_required handled

userStories.title: Webhook handler update
userStories.notes: payment_method_added set via default_payment_method check. checkout.session.completed also handles no_payment_required.

userStories.title: Trial Banner enriched
acceptanceCriteria: 0 EUR CTA for J-3 to J-1

userStories.title: Read-Only Banner redesign
userStories.notes: 3 role variants. Gestionnaire: red with upgrade CTA + export link. Locataire/prestataire: neutral gray.

userStories.title: Blocked mode on lists
userStories.notes: BlockedListOverlay on 3 lists. Detail pages redirect. Create buttons disabled with tooltip.

userStories.title: CRON and email updates
userStories.notes: Both CRONs filter payment_method_added. Email CTAs use 0 EUR messaging. Export link in expired email.

userStories.title: Login modal J-2
userStories.notes: TrialUpgradeModal on dashboard, sessionStorage dismiss, skipped if payment_method_added.

userStories.title: Billing page badge
userStories.notes: Green badge on billing page when trialing + payment_method_added. Shows first payment date.

userStories.title: Notification blocking
userStories.notes: isTeamNotificationsBlocked helper in both notification-actions.ts and conversation-notification-actions.ts. Checks read_only/unpaid/incomplete_expired statuses. Fail-open on error.

userStories.title: Locataire/Prestataire blocked
userStories.notes: Shared isTeamSubscriptionBlocked in lib/subscription-guard.ts. Both layouts show SubscriptionBanners (neutral gray) when blocked. Locataire detail pages redirect when blocked. Prestataire intervention detail allows IN_PROGRESS_STATUSES (planifiee, planification, approuvee). ReadOnlyBanner already has mailto:support@seido.be links.
